name: Naau Cafe
notes: Had the rasberry matcha. wasnt anything outstanding, but matcha itself was decent

name: Osoi
notes: Aesthetic is nice, matcha is nice and they have some different drinks available. Banananoffee affagato is to die for

name: Tori's Exhibition
notes: so many flavours and so many choices and the matcha is good

name: Donatellos
notes: Perfect for a sunday morning. On the sweeter sde. but they improved the recipes sm, and the matcha itself is good

name: Good Measure
notes: They only have matcha with oat molk so it made it really bitter but in an unnpleasant way. but everyone likes it. So I guess, i need to retry it.

name: Bola Bakes
notes: Matcha is weak, but their drinks are good.

name: Matcha Mate
notes: Not bad, the cookies were really good too, but nothing standed out

name: Haikuu
notes: Authentic, nicely done, but expensive for the small plastic cups is crazy

name: Be Merry
notes: sweet, nice company to the 10/10 of crepes they have though. Not bad matcha considering few places in Doncaster though

name: Bloomwood
notes: Surprisingly good, the matcha flavour was there but the banana matcha was too sweet.

name: Humble Rays
notes: Sweet, but nice to have while studying

name: Suupaa
notes: Very srong matcha flavour. likr bitter in your mouth, forrced to sip matcha, but honestly it was good and nice, dont go here if you want diabetic matcha

name: Molly Tea
notes: PERFUME IN A MATCHA BUT IN A GOOOOOOD WAY!!!!!!!!!!!!

name: Heytea
address: Emporium Melbourne, Lonsdale St, Melbourne VIC 3000
notes: Rating is subject to change. Recently got the matcha blue coconut drink, which was good but not enough matcha

name: GRB
address: Sydney Rd & Barry Rd, Campbellfield VIC 3061
notes: got the strawberry matcha. Tasted like strawberry milk? where the matcha at???????

name: Axl Coffee
notes: disgusting. dont even bother. they store the matcha in premade little containers as well, and then just like blitz it i guess with water and there are clumps when you drink it and its sickening

name: People's Coffee
notes: milky, and it is premade and it tastes bitter and gross.
